examples.name: count_ext
tree_size
prune_count
examples.py:
def prune_count(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count files in the tree, skipping excluded folders and their whole subtrees."""
    exclude = set(spec["exclude"])
    total = 0
    stack = [spec["tree"]]
    while stack:
        d = stack.pop()
        if d["name"] in exclude:
            continue
        total += len(d["files"])
        stack.extend(d["dirs"])
    return total
